spec_match.rationale: Flawless parallel model comparison showcasing simultaneous multi-instance SpeechRecognition bound to different quality configurations.

interactive.rationale: Dual streaming side-by-side speech visualization grids reading live audio feeds seamlessly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the Command vs. Dictation description.

edge_cases.rationale: Correct multi-instance lifecycle management cleanly initializing and stopping parallel streams together.

design_system.rationale: Clean side-by-side panel layout utilizing retro color highlights in absolute conformance.
